summary: Iteration 35 - FAB (Floating Action Button) Testing Complete. FAB is visible, clickable, opens menu with all navigation items, and persists across screens. All core requirements met.
critical_code_review_comments: FAB implementation is solid - uses data-testid='floating-menu-button' for testing
FloatingMenu.tsx properly hides on auth screens using HIDDEN_ON array
fabLayer in _layout.tsx correctly uses position: absolute and zIndex: 9999 for proper layering
Menu modal uses proper overlay with transparent background for dismissal
context_for_next_testing_agent: FAB (Floating Action Button) fully functional. Located at bottom-right (x~1848, y~1008, 52x52px). Opens menu with 11 items: Home, Bibbia, Diario, Quiz, Dizionario, Community, I Miei Contenuti, AI, Profilo, Donazioni, Impostazioni. Verified navigation to Quiz (/quiz) and Bibbia (/bible). FAB persists on all authenticated screens. Use data-testid='floating-menu-button' for FAB selection.

features_tested.fab_visibility_home: PASS - FAB visible at bottom-right after login (bounding box: x=1848, y=1008, width=52, height=52)
features_tested.fab_click_opens_menu: PASS - Menu opens with all 11 navigation items
features_tested.menu_items_present: PASS - All items visible: Home, Bibbia, Diario, Quiz, Dizionario, Community, I Miei Contenuti, AI, Profilo, Donazioni, Impostazioni
features_tested.navigation_quiz: PASS - Click Quiz navigates to /quiz (Quiz Biblici page with categories)
features_tested.fab_on_secondary_screens: PASS - FAB visible on Quiz, Bibbia, AI pages
features_tested.fab_no_overlap: PASS - No interactive elements overlap with FAB
features_tested.menu_close_overlay: PASS - Clicking overlay (dark background) closes menu
features_tested.menu_close_x_button: PASS - X button in menu header closes menu

test_details.overlap_check: No overlapping elements found near FAB
